series_metadata.series_description: Civil Rights plans documenting compliance with affirmative action and EEO requirements for 88 counties and 44+ Children's Service Boards. Also, includes county Child Protection and Oversight Reports showing compliance status.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 7 years, Review by State Archives prior to disposition. ; Electronic: Retain in office 7 years. Review by State Archives prior to disposition., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
